creator: zach@gaffaneys.com
text:
du -c simply puts out the numbers in the last directory visited.

Fix: Both -stable and -current need this fix:
How-To-Repeat: 
[before fix:]
$ cd /usr/src/bin
$ du -c ed ls
4       ed/CVS
10      ed/test/CVS
165     ed/test
290     ed
4       ls/CVS
60      ls
60      total
$ 
[after fix:]
$ cd /usr/src/bin
$ du -c ed ls
4       ed/CVS
10      ed/test/CVS
165     ed/test
290     ed
4       ls/CVS
60      ls
350     total
$
